lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: Greetings young one. What wisdom do you seek?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do in this room?

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: In this room you will see various cupboards. It is your task to search the cupboards to find items to turn into gold using your low or high alchemy spells. You can deposit the money in the receptacle at the end of the

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: hall in order to receive your Alchemist Pizazz Points. This money is used for the upkeep of the training arena as well as magic shops all around Gielinor. Keep an eye on the costs of each item as these will change

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: from time-to-time, as will the location of the items. Occasionally one of the items will be indicated as costing no runestones to convert to money.

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: You will get magic experience from casting the alchemist spells, as well as 1 Alchemist Pizazz Point for every 100 coins you deposit, and 10% of the coins you deposit will be given to you as you leave. Keep in mind that you

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: will not be able to take more than 1000 coins back out with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips that may help me?

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: You must remember to keep an eye on the various costs of the items. If you watch the movements of the other players, you might be able to guess which are the best places to visit. You will get 1 Pizazz Point for

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: every 100 coins, so if you have 190 coins, why not get an extra 10?

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: Oh, and a word of warning: should you decide to leave this room by a method other than the exit portals, you will be teleported to the entrance and have any items that you picked up in the room removed, but the gold

lines.speaker: Alchemy Guardian
lines.text: coins and Pizazz points you earned will be granted.

lines.speaker: Telekinetic Guardian
lines.text: Use what you've learned, young one.
